Label: SNP
Description: A single nucleotide polymorphism; a single-base sequence variant that is polymorphic in a population.

Label: SNV
Description: A single nucleotide variant; a genomic position at which different single-nucleotide alternatives exist.

Label: open chromatin region
Description: A DNA region corresponding to an unfolded, accessible stretch of chromatin.

Label: Dataset
Description: A set of RDF triples published, maintained, or aggregated as a single dataset, as defined by VoID.

Label: Statement
Description: An RDF reified statement representing a subject–predicate–object assertion.

Label: type 1 diabetes
Description: PanKgraph class representing type 1 diabetes as a disease or condition of interest.

Label: gene ontology
Description: PanKgraph class for Gene Ontology terms used to describe biological processes, molecular functions, or cellular components.

Label: Gene Ontology term
Description: PanKgraph class for GO concepts used as functional annotation targets.

Label: Article
Description: A published or publishable information content entity, such as a scholarly article.

Label: Cell
Description: A biological cell type or cell population represented as a Biolink entity.

Label: Cell line
Description: A population of cultured cells derived from a common source and maintained in vitro.

Label: Disease
Description: A disorder, condition, or pathological process affecting an organism.

Label: Gene
Description: A genomic entity that encodes a functional RNA or protein product or otherwise represents a gene locus.

Label: Ontology class
Description: A class or term from an ontology used as a controlled concept in the knowledge graph.

Label: datatype
Description: VoID-ext property indicating the datatype used by literal objects in a dataset partition.

Label: datatype partition
Description: VoID-ext property linking a dataset or partition to a partition grouped by literal datatype.

Label: object class partition
Description: VoID-ext property linking a property partition to a partition grouped by object class.

Label: modified
Description: Dublin Core term recording the date or time a resource was modified.

Label: source
Description: Dublin Core term identifying a related resource from which the described resource is derived.

Label: title
Description: Dublin Core term specifying a name given to the resource.

Label: last updated on
Description: PAV provenance property giving the date on which the resource was last updated.

Label: version
Description: PAV provenance property giving a version identifier for the resource.

Label: class
Description: VoID property indicating an RDF class used in a class partition.

Label: class partition
Description: VoID property linking a dataset to a partition containing triples about a specific class.

Label: distinct objects
Description: VoID property giving the number of distinct objects in a dataset or partition.

Label: distinct subjects
Description: VoID property giving the number of distinct subjects in a dataset or partition.

Label: entities
Description: VoID property giving the number of described entities in a dataset.

Label: properties
Description: VoID property giving the number of distinct properties used in a dataset.

Label: property
Description: VoID property indicating the RDF predicate represented by a property partition.

Label: property partition
Description: VoID property linking a dataset to a partition containing triples for a specific predicate.

Label: triples
Description: VoID property giving the number of RDF triples in a dataset or partition.

Label: object
Description: RDF reification property linking an rdf:Statement to the object of the asserted triple.

Label: predicate
Description: RDF reification property linking an rdf:Statement to the predicate of the asserted triple.

Label: subject
Description: RDF reification property linking an rdf:Statement to the subject of the asserted triple.

Label: comment
Description: RDFS annotation property providing a human-readable description of a resource.

Label: label
Description: RDFS annotation property providing a human-readable name for a resource.

Description: PanKgraph schema property: see Also.
